heading: Technical assistance to private entities
label: 2323 Technical assistance to private entities
notes: CodificationSection is comprised of . Subsec. (c) of amended .section 318 of Pub. L. 101–640section 318 of Pub. L. 101–640section 2314a of this titleSection was enacted as part of the Water Resources Development Act of 1990, and not as part of the Water Resources Development Act of 1986 which comprises this chapter.
“Secretary” DefinedSecretary means the Secretary of the Army, see , set out as a note under .section 2 of Pub. L. 101–640section 2201 of this title
amendments: CodificationSection is comprised of . Subsec. (c) of amended .section 318 of Pub. L. 101–640section 318 of Pub. L. 101–640section 2314a of this titleSection was enacted as part of the Water Resources Development Act of 1990, and not as part of the Water Resources Development Act of 1986 which comprises this chapter.

children.heading: Use of Corps research and development labs
children.label: a Use of Corps research and development labs

children.text: if the entity furnishes in advance of fiscal obligation by the United States such funds as are necessary to cover any and all costs of such research and development assistance;
if the Secretary determines that the research and development assistance to be provided is within the mission of the Corps of Engineers and is in the public interest;
if the entity has certified to the Secretary that provision of such research and development assistance is not otherwise reasonably and expeditiously obtainable from the private sector; and
if the entity has agreed to hold and save the United States free from any damages due to any such research and development assistance.

children.heading: Contract
children.label: b Contract
children.text: The Secretary may provide research and development assistance under subsection (a), or any part thereof, by contract.
